subject: security: add CSP headers, tighten iframe sandbox, harden bot detection
body:
- Add security headers to vercel.json: Content-Security-Policy,
  X-Frame-Options (SAMEORIGIN), X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff),
  Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy
- Remove allow-same-origin from iframe sandbox attributes — prevents
  embedded content from accessing parent cookies/localStorage
- Replace real API URL in .env.example with empty placeholder to avoid
  exposing the endpoint in source control
- Add timing-based bot detection to InterestForm — reject submissions
  faster than 1 second (supplements existing honeypot field)
- Update test setup to mock Date.now for timing check bypass

Tags: security, csp, headers, iframe, bot-detection
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: security
Semver: minor
